tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $98.21 May 26 confirmed (+0.99%, TradingEconomics; -6% week on deal 'largely negotiated' signal). Deal framework: 60-day Phase 1 Hormuz open + Iran oil sales; mine-clearing ~6 months delays physical supply recovery. Stress (47%) + Tail (23%) = 70% continued disruption pricing. Stop-loss approaching: Brent sub-$90 on confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + P&I restoration. Thesis weakening - reduce position on deal signature confirmation. Conviction medium (watching closely).

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $98.21 May 26 confirmed (-6% week); ASEAN Energy ~132.5 est. (-3.6%); ASEAN Banks ~187.0 est. (+2.7%); iTraxx Asia IG ~178bp (-6bp est.). Deal 'largely negotiated' May 23 - both legs going against position: energy equities falling with oil, banks rising on risk-on. Tail 23%. If deal signed: close both legs. Disputes (nuclear sequencing, Strait control) sustain uncertainty. Conviction low - thesis deteriorating on deal progress.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold Pending Deal Outcome
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~57.40 est. (-0.7% May 26; PHP strengthening on deal optimism). Deal 'largely negotiated' May 23 - mark-to-market further against position (entry D67 57.60); thesis weakening. Tail 23% still justifies USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay as hedge. If deal signed + mine clearance confirmed: close position. Nuclear sequencing + Strait sovereignty disputes sustain collapse risk. Stop-loss: confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance (below 57.00). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold Pending Deal Outcome
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~16,710 est. (-1.2% May 26; IDR strengthening on deal + lower Brent). Brent $98.21 May 26 - ICP overshoot ~$28/bbl easing but fiscal pressure persists. Deal 'largely negotiated' reduces tail; if signed, IDR may strengthen to 16,400-16,600 range. Tail 23%: collapse drives IDR weaker on Brent spike. Stop-loss: USD/IDR 16,400 (confirmed Hormuz reopening + P&I). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 178bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~178bp (-6bp May 26 est.); ASEAN HY ~550bp (-13bp est.). Deal 'largely negotiated' tightening spreads - approaching remove threshold. Tail (23%): deal collapse drives iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (47%) stabilises 165-200bp. Remove at confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + spreads below 165bp. Not yet at that level. IEA: record inventory depletion - structural credit risk elevated regardless of headline deal. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Physical Supply Lag
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $18.81 est. (Platts May 22; Canada LNG weekly May 25 pending); TTF €46.71 May 26 confirmed (+2.47%, TradingEconomics; Norwegian exports surge persists). Deal 'largely negotiated' - Ras Laffan restart still not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months delays Qatar LNG resumption regardless of deal. JKM-TTF structural premium intact: Asian supply shortage does not resolve on deal signature. Stress target $16-20 JKM; tail $24-28. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + Ras Laffan restart timeline confirmed. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~178bp (-6bp May 26 est.) - tightening on deal 'largely negotiated'; window widening. Execute any residual private placements now before deal either collapses (tail 23% - spreads spike to 230-260bp) or fully signs (credit demand surge from deal-related issuance). Tail: collapse targets 230-260bp.

Brent $98.21 May 26 confirmed (+0.99%, TradingEconomics); THB ~32.90 est. (-0.9%); Thailand 10Y ~2.18% est. (-4bp); tail 23%. Deal 'largely negotiated' - PTTEP EBITDA moderates at lower Brent; execute USD H2 prefunding immediately. Window closing: if deal signed, credit market tightens sharply; if collapsed (tail 23%), spreads spike. OFAC Economic Fury (May 11) Gulf JV sanctions-compliance unchanged.

iTraxx Asia IG ~178bp (-6bp May 26 est.); USD/SGD ~1.2660 est. (-0.5%); Brent $98.21 May 26 confirmed. Deal 'largely negotiated' - spreads tightening, window opening. Execute revolving-credit extension now: tail (23%) collapse scenario still targets 230bp+; deal signature scenario brings competing issuance. Full USD hedging: SGD strengthening on deal news reduces hedge cost.

ASEAN HY ~550bp (-13bp May 26 est.); Brent $98.21 May 26 confirmed. Deal 'largely negotiated' - spreads tightening, window opening. Hyflux desalination power cost easing on Brent $98 vs prior $104+. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms now before deal binary resolves. Tail (23%): collapse pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
